_comment: Commissioner split registry. Per ticker, list {date, ratio} where date = the first day the stock TRADES split-adjusted (ex-date) and ratio = new shares per old share (4-for-1 => 4; 1-for-10 reverse => 0.1). Baselines are auto-restated for splits dated after the July-1 start once they take effect; charts are smoothed for all splits. Add a line here if another pick splits during the month.

CRWD.note: 4-for-1 split; distributed after close Jul 1, trades split-adjusted from Jul 2
